# opnsense_quagga_ospf_area (Resource)

Manages an OSPF area in the OPNsense FRR/Quagga plugin. Areas are UUID-backed OSPF sub-resources and are applied with the Quagga service reconfigure endpoint.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "opnsense_quagga_ospf_area" "stub_area" {
  area_id = "0.0.0.1"
  type    = "stub"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `area_id` (String) OSPF area ID in dotted IPv4 format.
- `type` (String) OSPF area type.

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this OSPF area is enabled.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.

## Import

Import is supported using the OSPF area UUID from OPNsense.

```shell
terraform import opnsense_quagga_ospf_area.stub_area 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
```
